categories.title: WiFi / Network Issues
steps: Check if the WiFi indicator light on your router is on and stable.
Toggle WiFi off and on from your device settings.
Forget the network and reconnect — go to WiFi settings, select the network, and choose 'Forget'.
Restart your device completely.
If on a laptop, try connecting via ethernet cable to rule out a WiFi adapter issue.
Check if other devices on the same network have internet — this tells us if it's device-specific or network-wide.
categories.ticket_reason: Network issue persists after standard troubleshooting steps

categories.title: VPN Not Connecting
steps: Confirm you have an active internet connection before launching VPN.
Close the VPN client completely and reopen it.
Check that you're using the correct VPN server address provided by IT.
Ensure your credentials (username/password) are up to date — your AD password may have changed.
Temporarily disable your antivirus or firewall and try connecting again.
Uninstall and reinstall the VPN client if the issue persists.
categories.ticket_reason: VPN connection failure after credential and client checks

categories.title: Password Reset / Account Locked
steps: Go to the self-service password reset portal at reset.company.com.
Enter your employee ID and registered email address.
Check your personal email for a reset link — it may take 2-3 minutes.
If your account is locked, wait 15 minutes and try again — accounts auto-unlock after failed attempts.
Make sure Caps Lock is off when entering your new password.
If you cannot access the reset portal, IT will need to verify your identity manually.
categories.ticket_reason: Account locked or password reset portal inaccessible

categories.title: Laptop Not Starting / Black Screen
steps: Hold the power button for 10 seconds to force a shutdown, then press it once to restart.
Check if the charging light is on — if not, try a different charger or power outlet.
Connect an external monitor to see if the display itself is the issue.
Try booting in Safe Mode — press F8 repeatedly during startup (Windows) or hold Shift during restart (Mac).
Remove any external USB drives or docking stations and try booting again.
If you see a spinning wheel or loading screen for more than 10 minutes, the OS may be corrupted.
categories.ticket_reason: Device fails to boot after power cycle and safe mode attempts

categories.title: Printer Not Working
steps: Check if the printer shows as 'Offline' in your device list — right-click and select 'Use Printer Online'.
Cancel all pending print jobs from the print queue.
Turn the printer off, wait 30 seconds, and turn it back on.
Remove and re-add the printer from your system settings.
Check for paper jams by opening all printer trays and doors.
Make sure the printer and your device are on the same network.
categories.ticket_reason: Printer remains unresponsive after queue clear and reconnection

categories.title: Email / Outlook Issues
steps: Check your internet connection first — Outlook requires connectivity to sync.
Look at the bottom status bar in Outlook — it should say 'Connected to Microsoft Exchange'.
Click Send/Receive All Folders (F9) to force a sync.
Close and reopen Outlook.
Clear the Outlook cache — go to File > Account Settings > Data Files > Open File Location, then delete the .ost file and restart Outlook.
If emails are stuck in Outbox, check attachment size — files over 25MB are typically blocked.
categories.ticket_reason: Outlook sync failure or persistent send/receive errors

categories.title: Software Installation / Access Request
steps: Check if the software is available in the Company Software Portal (Self Service / Software Center).
Ensure you have admin rights — most installations require IT-elevated permissions.
If it's a licensed tool, confirm with your manager that a license has been approved for you.
Try running the installer as Administrator (right-click → Run as Administrator).
Disable antivirus temporarily during installation if it's being blocked.
If access to a system is needed, your manager must submit an access request form.
categories.ticket_reason: Software installation blocked or license approval required
